title: Damage Reduction
wikitext:
[[File:Images_(18).jpeg|thumb|380px|Yujiro Hanma can make his body completely limp and flow like a blade of grass in a storm to reduce damage.]]

==Summary==
'''Damage Reduction''', also known as '''Damage Minimalization''', is an ability to decrease and reduce the damage the target takes making them harder to defeat or destroy. 

This is different from [[Statistics Reduction]], because the opponent's statistics are not reduced, just the damage alone.

This is also different from [[Statistics Amplification]] because nothing of their statistics are actually amplified.

The users of this ability are usually considered as tanks or hard-to-kill because of their potential to prolong the duration of the fight without any fatal damage.

*[[The Player (Minecraft)|The Player]] ([[Minecraft]])
